sentences.sentence: Textbooks are arranged on these center aisles.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Used copies can be purchased at a discount from the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-sed, -nt) and stress on 'front counter'

sentences.sentence: Course-required readers are organized by department on the wall shelves.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in 'organized' and 'department'

sentences.sentence: Your software updates and digital codes activate automatically at checkout.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in 'automatically'

sentences.sentence: Reusable bags are available at every register.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Your returns and exchanges must be completed within fourteen days of purchase.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rns, -ges) and stress placement

sentences.sentence: If you need help locating a specific title, check the directory near the main entrance for department maps.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across long sentences and conditional intonation pattern

sentences.sentence: Mailboxes are by the lobby entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Move-in carts can be borrowed for thirty minutes at a time.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rts, -nts) and reduced 'for'

sentences.sentence: Your bedding and toiletry kits sell in the welcome shop downstairs.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in 'toiletry' and stress on compound nouns

sentences.sentence: Laundry rooms are located on every other floor of the residence hall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between 'on every' and reduced 'of the'

sentences.sentence: Quiet hours begin nightly at ten and end at seven.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rs, -t) and stress on 'nightly'

sentences.sentence: When you settle into your room, place any electrical items on the side near the outlets.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words 'into your' and linking 'electrical items'

sentences.sentence: If you need anything during the first week, check the schedule posted in the lobby for advisor office hours daily.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries and stress-timing over long sentences

sentences.sentence: Power tools are in the back aisle.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants and stress on 'back aisle'

sentences.sentence: Your replacement filters can be purchased at the customer service counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in 'replacement' and stress on 'customer service counter'

sentences.sentence: Lawn and garden supplies are organized seasonally by the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rd, -nts) and reduced 'seasonally'

sentences.sentence: Bulk fasteners are sold by weight at the hardware section.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress on compound noun 'hardware section' and consonant cluster 'fasteners'

sentences.sentence: Paint mixing services are available throughout regular store hours.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in 'available' and stress on 'paint mixing'

sentences.sentence: If you need help finding a specific item, look for the colored aisle markers above.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech 'if you' and stress-timing across the long sentence

sentences.sentence: Before you check out, please bring any cut lumber or custom-mixed paint to the inspection counter near the registers.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across long sentence and linked function words 'to the'
